UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the CareerAI application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

Resume.title: Resume
Resume.description: Represents a resume created by a job seeker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Resume entity.

title.description: The title or name of the resume.

content.description: The content of the resume, likely stored as JSON or text.

atsScore.description: The ATS score of the resume.

aiInsights.description: AI insights and suggestions for the resume.

JobPosting.title: JobPosting
JobPosting.description: Represents a job posting created by an employer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobPosting entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N JobPosting). Represents the employer who created the job posting.

title.description: The title of the job posting.

description.description: The description of the job posting.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with this job posting, to improve searchability.

company.description: The name of the company offering the job.

Application.title: Application
Application.description: Represents a job application submitted by a job seeker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Application entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Application). Represents the job seeker who submitted the application.

applicationDate.description: The date when the application was submitted.

ResumeTemplate.title: ResumeTemplate
ResumeTemplate.description: Represents a template used for creating resumes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ResumeTemplate entity.

name.description: The name of the resume template.

content.description: The content of the resume template (e.g., HTML or JSON structure).

AIJobSuggestion.title: AIJobSuggestion
AIJobSuggestion.description: Represents a job suggestion generated by AI for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIJobSuggestion entity.

reason.description: The reason why the AI suggested this job to the user.

suggestionDate.description: The date when the suggestion was generated.

ResumeRanking.title: ResumeRanking
ResumeRanking.description: Represents the AI ranking of a resume for a specific job posting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ResumeRanking entity.

rank.description: The ranking of the resume for the job posting (e.g., 1 for the top-ranked resume).

aiReasoning.description: The AI's reasoning for the ranking.

missingSkillsAnalysis.description: Analysis of missing skills or qualifications in the resume and suggestions for addressing them.

definition.description: Stores user profile information.  Parent collection for user-owned data (resumes, job postings).

params.name: userProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.  This ID is used for path-based ownership of associated data.

definition.description: Stores resumes created by users. Uses path-based ownership: only the user who created the resume can access it.

params.name: userProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (owner of the resume).

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the resume.

definition.description: Stores job postings created by employers. Uses path-based ownership: only the employer who created the job posting can access it.

params.name: userProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (employer who created the job posting).

params.name: jobPostingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the job posting.

definition.description: Stores job applications. Each application links to a user profile, job posting, and resume. No specific authorization fields denormalized as read access is generally public.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the application.

definition.description: Stores resume templates.  Generally public read access.

params.name: resumeTemplateId
params.description: The unique identifier for the resume template.

definition.description: Stores job suggestions generated by AI. No specific authorization fields denormalized as read access is generally public.

params.name: aiJobSuggestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI job suggestion.

definition.description: Stores the AI ranking of a resume for a specific job posting. Read access is granted to those with access to the JobPosting.  Considers denormalizing userProfileId and jobPostingId for authorization purposes.

params.name: resumeRankingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the resume ranking.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support the CareerAI application's core features, focusing on resume building, job searching, AI-powered suggestions, and resume ranking. It emphasizes authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. User profiles are stored separately from resumes and job postings. Resumes and JobPostings created by users are stored in subcollections under the users document, which enables simpler security rules based on path based ownership. For AI Job Suggestions and Resume Rankings, separate collections are used, as these have different access patterns and lifecycles, avoiding the mixing of data with different security postures. The structure avoids hierarchical authorization dependencies by not relying on `get()` calls in security rules, ensuring atomic operations and ease of debugging. QAPs (Rules are not Filters) are supported via structural segregation and path based ownership.
